query: INSERT INTO engagements (name, customerName, description, engagementType, status, targetDomain, targetIpRange, roe_status, roe_signed_date, roe_signer_name, roe_signer_email, roe_scope, startDate) VALUES ('Vianova External Pentest', 'Vianova', 'Full-scope external penetration test for Vianova infrastructure. Targets include primary web properties, mail servers, and external-facing network services.', 'pentest', 'active', 'vianova.io, app.vianova.io, api.vianova.io, mail.vianova.io', '203.0.113.10, 203.0.113.11, 203.0.113.12, 198.51.100.0/24', 'signed', NOW(), 'Harrison Cook', 'harrison@aceofcloud.com', '{"inScopeDomains": ["vianova.io", "*.vianova.io"], "inScopeIPs": ["203.0.113.0/24", "198.51.100.0/24"], "outOfScope": ["internal.vianova.io", "staging.vianova.io"], "allowedHours": "24/7", "maxSeverity": "critical", "socialEngineering": false, "physicalAccess": false, "dosAllowed": false}', NOW());
